evidence: Variable importance is shown in Figure 2 ("The variable importance of the top 5 word stems for each concept predicted by the model is noted in Fig. 2") but receives no further discussion. All substantive conclusions depend on classification accuracy metrics: AUC values across nine concepts (0.98, 0.94, 0.89, 0.92, 0.84, 0.96, 0.98, 0.97, 0.99), sensitivity/specificity ranges, and grading accuracy. The importance ranking is never interpreted to support any claim.
